title: Look up user by name in admin search

expected_findings.message: User input is concatenated directly into SQL, allowing SQL injection.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: SQL injection via string concatenation; should use PreparedStatement.

title: Add helper to format display name

ground_truth.notes: clean

title: Read config file contents
diff:
--- a/app/config_loader.py
+++ b/app/config_loader.py
@@ -12,5 +12,9 @@ class ConfigLoader:
     def load(self, path):
-        return {}
+        f = open(path, "r")
+        data = f.read()
+        parsed = self._parse(data)
+        return parsed

expected_findings.message: File handle is opened but never closed; leaks the descriptor, especially if _parse raises.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: resource leak (file not closed, no context manager).

title: Hash session token before storing
diff:
--- a/app/auth/tokens.py
+++ b/app/auth/tokens.py
@@ -3,5 +3,8 @@ import hashlib
 
 def store_token(token, store):
-    store.put(token)
+    digest = hashlib.md5(token.encode()).hexdigest()
+    store.put(digest)
+    return digest

expected_findings.message: MD5 is cryptographically broken and unsuitable for hashing security tokens.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: weak crypto (MD5) used for a security token.

title: Compute average of scores
diff:
--- a/app/stats.py
+++ b/app/stats.py
@@ -5,3 +5,6 @@ def total(scores):
     return sum(scores)
+
+def average(scores):
+    return sum(scores) / len(scores)

expected_findings.message: Division by len(scores) raises ZeroDivisionError when scores is empty.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: missing empty-input guard causes ZeroDivisionError.

title: Append item to cart

ground_truth.notes: clean

title: Get last element of buffer

expected_findings.message: Off-by-one: last valid index is count-1, so data[count] reads past the filled region or out of bounds.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: off-by-one indexing error (should be count-1).

title: Accumulate log lines per request
diff:
--- a/app/logger.py
+++ b/app/logger.py
@@ -7,4 +7,8 @@ class RequestLogger:
+    def record(self, msg, sink=[]):
+        sink.append(msg)
+        return sink
+
     def flush(self):
         pass

expected_findings.message: Mutable default argument is shared across calls, accumulating state between unrelated requests.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: mutable default argument (shared list).

title: Expose order total accessor

ground_truth.notes: clean

title: Process payment, notify, and audit in one step

expected_findings.message: God method: payment, email, SMS, audit, analytics, inventory, loyalty, and shipping are all crammed into one method, violating SRP.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: god method / SRP violation (too many responsibilities in one method).

title: Decode user record fields
diff:
--- a/app/client.py
+++ b/app/client.py
@@ -10,4 +10,9 @@ class ApiClient:
     def get_user(self, uid):
         d = requests.get(self.base + "/users/" + str(uid)).json()
+        x = d["first_name"]
+        y = d["last_name"]
+        z = d["email_addr"]
+        return (x, y, z)
+
     def close(self):
         self.session.close()

expected_findings.message: Single-letter names x, y, z hide that these are first name, last name, and email.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: unclear naming (x/y/z for named fields). Cosmetic only.

title: Build greeting from profile

expected_findings.message: getNickname() may return null (nickname is optional), so toUpperCase() can throw NullPointerException.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: null dereference on a reachable path (optional nickname).

title: Run query with prepared statement

ground_truth.notes: clean

title: Parse port from env
diff:
--- a/app/settings.py
+++ b/app/settings.py
@@ -4,3 +4,7 @@ import os
 
 def get_port():
-    return 8080
+    raw = os.environ["PORT"]
+    return int(raw)

expected_findings.message: Missing error handling: direct subscript raises KeyError when PORT is unset instead of falling back to a default.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: missing error handling on environment lookup (KeyError).

title: Add x and y coordinates
diff:
--- a/app/geometry.py
+++ b/app/geometry.py
@@ -1,3 +1,7 @@ 
 def add_points(a, b):
-    pass
+    return (a[0] + b[0], a[1] + b[1])
+
+def origin():
+    return (0, 0)

ground_truth.notes: clean

title: Refactor temp variable in price calc

expected_findings.message: Single-letter variables a and b obscure that they are the tax amount and gross total.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: unclear naming (a/b instead of tax/gross). Cosmetic only.

title: Render template with user comment
diff:
--- a/app/views.py +++ b/app/views.py @@ -14,4 +14,8 @@ def comment_page(request): comment = request.GET.get("c", "") - return render("comment.html", {}) + html = "
" + comment + "
" + return HttpResponse(html)

expected_findings.message: Unescaped user input is written into HTML, enabling reflected XSS.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: reflected XSS via unescaped user comment.

title: Cache computed factorial
diff:
--- a/app/math_utils.py
+++ b/app/math_utils.py
@@ -2,4 +2,9 @@ from functools import lru_cache
 
+@lru_cache(maxsize=128)
+def factorial(n):
+    if n <= 1:
+        return 1
+    return n * factorial(n - 1)

ground_truth.notes: clean

title: Close socket after send

expected_findings.message: Socket is closed only on the happy path; an exception during write leaks the connection. Use try-with-resources.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: resource leak (socket not closed on exception path).

title: Extract domain from email

expected_findings.message: When email has no '@', indexOf returns -1 and substring(0) silently returns the whole string instead of a domain.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: unhandled no-'@' case yields a wrong (whole-string) result.

title: Delete file matching path
diff:
--- a/app/files.py
+++ b/app/files.py
@@ -8,4 +8,8 @@ import os
 
 def remove_user_file(name):
-    pass
+    path = "/data/uploads/" + name
+    os.system("rm -rf " + path)

expected_findings.message: Unsanitized user-controlled name is interpolated into a shell command, allowing command injection.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: OS command injection via os.system with concatenated input.

title: Convert temperature units
diff:
--- a/app/temperature.py
+++ b/app/temperature.py
@@ -1,2 +1,6 @@ 
 def c_to_f(c):
     return c * 9 / 5 + 32
+
+def f_to_c(f):
+    return (f - 32) * 5 // 9

expected_findings.message: Floor division // truncates the fractional part, producing wrong Celsius values (e.g. 70F -> 21 instead of 21.1).

ground_truth.notes: Planted: integer floor division loses precision in unit conversion.

title: Index into results list

expected_findings.message: Loop condition i <= n iterates one past the requested count and can index beyond the list size, throwing IndexOutOfBoundsException.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: off-by-one loop bound (<= n) risking out-of-bounds access.

title: Toggle feature flag in cache

ground_truth.notes: clean

title: Verify password against stored hash
diff:
--- a/app/auth/password.py
+++ b/app/auth/password.py
@@ -10,5 +10,9 @@ class PasswordChecker:
     def verify(self, supplied, stored_hash):
-        return False
+        computed = self._hash(supplied)
+        if computed == stored_hash:
+            return True
+        return False

expected_findings.message: Non-constant-time == comparison of password hashes leaks timing information; use a constant-time compare.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: timing-unsafe equality comparison of secret hashes.

title: Map status code to label

ground_truth.notes: clean

title: Load and deserialize cached object
diff:
--- a/app/cache_store.py
+++ b/app/cache_store.py
@@ -3,5 +3,9 @@ import pickle
 
 def load(self, blob):
-    return None
+    obj = pickle.loads(blob)
+    return obj

expected_findings.message: Deserializing untrusted bytes with pickle.loads can execute arbitrary code.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: insecure deserialization via pickle.loads on untrusted data.

title: Track retry count and do everything on failure

expected_findings.message: God method: metrics, logging, paging, persistence, dead-lettering, email, Slack, rescheduling, and cache eviction are all handled inline, violating SRP.

ground_truth.notes: Planted: god method / SRP violation (failure handler does too many things).
